achievements.title: A Giant Enemy Crab
achievements.description: Defeat the Giant Crab at River Belle Path.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Slow Down, It's Not That Shocking!
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Giant Crab without being afflicted with Slow or Paralysis.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Feed Me, Seymour!
achievements.description: Defeat the Malboro at The Mushroom Forest.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Why a Malboro? Why Couldn't It Be Fight the Butterflies!
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Malboro without using the Attack command and without damaging either of the Hell Plants.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Lieutenant Gothmog
achievements.description: Defeat the Orc King at The Mine of Cathuriges.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Looks Like Meat's Back on the Menu, Boys!
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Orc King with a maximum capacity of 4 hearts and without letting you or Mog carry the Chalice after dealing damage to the Orc King.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: The First Year of My Journey...
achievements.description: Complete the first year.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Into the Goblin's Den
achievements.description: Defeat the Goblin King at Goblin Wall
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Pshhh... Shkohhh...Meatyshield Avoid Gobbiesmack and Gobbiespell
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Goblin King without taking damage or being afflicted with Poison.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Home, Sweet Home
achievements.description: Defeat Gigas Lord & Maggie at Moschet Manor.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Breaking and Entering
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Gigas Lord & Maggie without using the Attack command and without being afflicted with Slow or Frozen.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Village of the Dead
achievements.description: Defeat Armstrong at Tida.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Strong Arm
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat Armstrong without ever switching off the Attack command.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: My Second Year Concludes...
achievements.description: Complete the second year.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Well Spring of Veo Lu
achievements.description: Defeat the Golem at Veo Lu Sluice.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Living Machinery
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Golem without damaging either of the Water Flans or being afflicted by Slow, Frozen or Burned.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Agamidae Swarm
achievements.description: Defeat the Lizardman King at Daemon's Court.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: The King's Court
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Lizardman King without letting you or Mog carry the Chalice after dealing damage to the Lizardman King.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: The Cave of Wind
achievements.description: Defeat the Cave Worm at Selepation Cave.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Breaking Out of Your Shell
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Cave Worm only dealing damage to it while outside of the Chalice Safety Aura.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Third Time's the Charm...
achievements.description: Complete the third year.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Iron Deficiency
achievements.description: Defeat the Iron Giant at Mount Kilanda.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Take the Chalice to the Fires of Mount Doom... No, Kilanda
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Iron Giant without ever switching off the Attack command and without being hit more than 3 times.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Selkie Sanctuary
achievements.description: Defeat the Dragon Zombie at Conall Curach.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: This Fight Is Going to Dragon
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Dragon Zombie without ever casting Holy on it.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Labyrinth of the Dead
achievements.description: Defeat the Lich at Rebena Te Ra.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Necromancy
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Lich without being afflicted with Paralysis or Burned and without casting Gravity on the Lich.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Fourth Year, More to Come...
achievements.description: Complete the fourth year.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Desert Digging
achievements.description: Defeat the Antlion at Lynari Desert.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Kill It With Fire
achievements.description: During the first cycle only, defeat the Antlion without being afflicted with Petrification and only casting Firaga to damage the Antlion.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: The Source of Miasma
achievements.description: Defeat the Meteor Parasite at Mount Vellenge.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Parasitic Problems
achievements.description: Defeat the Meteor Parasite without dealing any damage to the Tentacles.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: Remember
achievements.description: Defeat Memiroa at The Nest of Memories.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: With the Power of Friendship
achievements.description: Defeat Memiroa during your fifth Caravan Year.
achievements.author: blendedsea

achievements.title: The End of Miasma
achievements.description: Deliver the final blow to the Meteor Parasite.
achievements.author: blendedsea
